reviews.text: Todd Peterson was the best he won my case and stayed by my side threw the whole process even after it took almost 2 half years if you need a great attorney you won't regret it. Thanks Todd so so much.
Mr. Peterson is awesome and super helpful, couldn't have gone with a better lawyer.

Todd and his legal team helped out tremendously. I received a out-of-state ticket while traveling through Utah and his team was able to reduce my ticket plus have my case dismissed early. I'm really thankful for his legal services and guidance.

Todd is an excellent attorney. He was able to get me a plea and abeyance deal with an extremely aggressive prosecution team. He has been very helpful with my correspondence with the court and helping myself and others I have recommended with our cases. I highly recommend him to anyone.

Definitely the best Lawyer I had so far. Todd has helped me from the beginning of my case till the end, he is the exact one that can really reliable on to. I have a [misdemeanor class A] & [2nd degree felony] so Todd helped me out and dismissed the [misdemeanor charge] and dropped my [2nd degree felony] to [3rd degree felony] If you have felony or misdemeanor cases, I highly recommended Mr. Todd Peterson to help you guys out. 5 STARS!

Todd was referred by a friend.  He responded quickly to legal needs my wife encountered.  He took over and was able to arrange a favorable outcome for my wife, even representing her in court.  His knowledge saved us time and headache.  I will be contacting him first if we ever need future representation.

I was charged with domestic violence criminal mischief. The situation wasn’t how it seemed and my wife told the police that as well. However the police did not care and charged me. The domestic violence charge would have prevented me from going to dental school and hold me back from my future. Todd Peterson FOUGHT the prosecutors to get that reduced to criminal mischief no dv. He saw that I was not who they said I was on paper. Todd Peterson not only spoke up for me and defended me when prosecutors wanted to cast me aside, but he also protected my ability to provide for my beautiful wife and our future children. It’s a shame that a 5 star review is all I can give because Todd for sure deserves 10. Thank you for all your help Mr. Peterson.  Both myself and my family thank you from the bottom of our hearts.
Todd is so knowledgeable and he was always available to answer all my questions. I knew he that he knew what he was doing and I trusted him to help me. I’m so glad I had him to help me.
Todd is a great attorney. He helped me with my case and got me the best result possible. He was able to get me a plea in abeyance. I’m so happy I had him to help me. I wouldn’t recommend anyone else.

Todd recently helped me with a first degree felony trial. He was amazing. He knows the law and he is a great advocate for his clients. We won the case and Todd's help was indispensable in our victory. I highly recommend Todd Peterson.

Left my name and contact info on their website about 2+ weeks ago but haven't heard a thing from anyone representing this firm. Find that to be very unprofessional.

Okay, update time.... It's been 9+ weeks now and I have tried to initiate contact by phone several times with no response. The Lawyers for Veterans lawyers, nor their staff, have made not one phone call, nor sent one email, text message, tweet, telegraph, telegram, or smoke signal in an attempt to contact me. I don't see why they claim to do legal work for veterans on a "pro-bono or low-bono" basis when they can't even communicate with potential clients. Judging by almost every review on Google, it almost appears that their using veterans as a write off or to get some kind of kickback. Not one good Google review and, not to mention, there are also, and literally, no statements made by any of the members of Lawyers for Veterans in their defense. Nor are there any attempts to even simply respond to any of the veterans who are complaining in this forum. Thanks for having our back guys!! It's not like we we ever had yours, right?? My next complaint will be to the VA and the State Bar. Thank you for YOUR service!!

Do waste your time and money with Peter Strand. Has to be the most unprofessional lawyer there is. He is a prime example of a broken judicial system along with having a participation license. So if you are a veteran find someone else to help you with court.
Simply put, Mike is a problem solver. Thanks, Mike.
I've used Mike Anderson on many occasions and his advise has been spot on! He is great to work with and cares about your situation.

Mike Anderson helped me with my small business.  The law firms that are downtown are so expensive and charge you for everything under the sun.  Mike is different.  I heard about him from the radio show and he was great.  As a small company, we needed a small business lawyer that would help us with some contracts and other issues.  Mike delivered on time and was easy to work with.  He's easily the kindest, most generous attorney I've ever worked with.  Oh, and his staff is good too.  They were really good and at making sure I got my questions answered and even though there was a small hickup getting the papers to me, they were able to get them to me when I needed them - thanks again for being so great for lawsuits and litigation.

This guy is a serious crook! He took my husband's money told us he'd let us know when the $1500 ran out and we'd go from there. Well he lied through his teeth!!! Did absolutely nothing for him and then added an additional $1500 to the bill without even notifying us! Plus he even missed all the deadlines to have the paperwork submit the papers so we lost all chance of hiring someone else and getting any resolution! Definitely would NOT recommend him!!!

I initially worked with Mike on my divorce and found him to be very responsive, honest, quick, effective, and straight forward. He's a straight-shooter for sure. His advice has been fantastic and has surely saved me time, effort, and even thousands of dollars. Mike is a get it done type of lawyer. One you want to keep on speed dial. He's also a real estate agent and helped my friend sell his house.

Mike is the best! I worked with him to form my new tech start-up company LLC as well as getting my new logo trademarked. He was referred to me by a Plubmer/HVAC company owner. He not only worked within my estimated budget, but made himself available by phone to answer all of my questions online. I like his small business lawyer program which is not too expensive for a new start-up. I'm really grateful to Mike for all he's done and I know that I will continue to consult him on all my legal issues. Thanks again Mike! He's the best business lawyer in Utah!

This is a great law firm. I really was impressed with how the staff was both caring and helpful to me. Both the front office manager and attorney answered all of my questions and they returned my phone calls in a timely manner. As a new business owner, they told me exactly what I needed to do. Their general counsel program is cost-effective and gets me what I need. I would recommend them to anyone who needs representation for their business.
Great understanding professionals
They are not professional, they do not return calls and they send important things that you should know to your spam. So make sure you check your spam mail.
Very professional and they do things the right way!
I had a very unique case and Jacob handled it with care and professionalism. He communicated very well with me and let have me great counsel along the way.
Jake did a great job with my divorce case! He laid out a good plan and I was very pleased with the results. He was a calming voice in a very stressful time. I would highly recommend him!

I had a consultation with Jacob, and even though my case was pretty straightforward, he still took the time to speak with me, listen patiently, and answer my questions—without even charging me! He responded immediately when I asked for an urgent appointment and genuinely cared. I didn’t end up needing representation, but if I ever do, he’ll be my first call.

I am so grateful for Jacob Arijanto and Nicole Wiley!! They made a stressful divorce modification process so much easier, always keeping me informed and supported. Even when I thought all was lost, Jacob was there to reassure me and guide me through the every step.
If you're looking for a team that's skilled, professional, and truly compassionate, I can't recommend Jacob and Nicole at Carr Woodall enough.

Working with this attorney was one of the most negative professional experiences I’ve ever had. In my opinion, he did not act with honesty, transparency, or integrity throughout my case. I consistently felt misled, manipulated, and treated unfairly, and it seemed that his actions were focused more on creating conflict than on finding solutions that served my child’s best interests.

Instead of facilitating resolution, his approach only prolonged and worsened an already difficult family situation. I felt he prioritized winning at any cost rather than fairness or justice, which left me questioning both his ethics and his commitment to his clients.

Based on my experience, I would strongly caution anyone considering this attorney for family law matters. In my view, his practices caused harm rather than help, and I cannot recommend his services.

Really can’t say enough good things about Jacob. He wrapped up a legal battle that had been going on almost 2 years within a couple months and would have done it faster if it wasn’t for scheduling. He was professional, straight forward, communicative, and knowledgeable. I 100% trust him with any case I have going forward.

Jacob and Nicole did a great job handling our case! I felt important and listened to. Jacob is a great advocate and tenacious in his representation. I would recommend them to anyone going through a tough child custody issue.
Jacob was amazing to work with. Understood my concerns and made sure I understood everything through the whole process. Highly recommend.

I am incredibly grateful for the care, professionalism, and empathy shown by Jacob Arijanto and Nicole Wiley during one of the most difficult seasons of my life. Going through a divorce and making that decision is never easy, but their support made all the difference.

Even as certain pieces of my case are currently still being worked on, both Jacob  and Nicole have remained attentive, timely, and deeply understanding of the emotional and legal complexities I’ve faced. They have treated me with dignity and respect, never making me feel like just another case.

Their empathy, responsiveness, and commitment to helping me through this challenging time are what truly set them apart. I highly recommend their services to anyone who needs not just legal support, but true human understanding. Thank you for all your hard work and all you do.

Jacob, was very helpful with my very difficult divorce that he’s had taken on. The process took a while but he was able to get me from starting off with only supervised visitations to 50/50 by the end of the divorce, and my most important belongings back.

I can't say enough good about Jacob. Went through a very high conflict divorce, and unfortunately/fortunately, will probably always need Jacob's services for dealing with the ex. Jacob knew how to handle not only my emotional self but also knew the best way to respond to my ex's antics throughout the process. He and Nicole are very responsive, they get things done timely, and he bills very fairly. While I wish my money could have gone to almost anything else other than paying for a divorce, Jacob is worth every penny.

I cannot recommend Jacob Arijanto highly enough! From the moment I walked into his office, I felt reassured by his warm and friendly demeanor. Jacob was not only incredibly knowledgeable about family law but also displayed empathy and patience throughout my case. He guided me every step of the way, always ensuring I fully understood the process and my options. Thanks to Jacob's expertise and dedication I was able to get what I wanted from my case.

I worked closely with Jacob and Nicole to navigate my divorce,  while this is never a fun situation they both handled it class and care.  If you find yourself in need for legal representation you will not find a better team.  .

Horrible experience!! Jacob knew my financial situation going into my divorce, but agreed to take my case. He wasted my time and thousands of dollars unnecessarily, that I did not have to begin with. I am over one year into my divorce and still no resolution. Jacob constantly threatened me to put a lien on my house and charge me interest, which is very unethical, although I have made payments monthly.  Please look elsewhere for an honest, intelligent, compassionate attorney, you will not find one here! I went with him because of his good Google reviews, bad idea! Hopefully my review is informative and helps you seek out a better attorney!! Jacob has now withdrawn from my case, because I could not afford to pay him as much as he wanted monthly. Please don’t ever give him your debit card, unless you don’t care that he will be making large withdrawals whenever he feels like it! Good riddance to the constant threats,  and insensitivity he displays as an unethical attorney! Now I will be finding an attorney who can communicate, handle things properly, quickly, and help end this process as soon as possible. Divorce is already hard enough, no one needs to be drug through the mud, pressured, and threatened by their attorney as well!! Jacob made to feel that because I don’t have thousands of dollars whenever he needs, that he did not have time for my case! Almost every time I talked to Jacob, l was threatened due to money and balance owed. I even had another attorney tell me Jacob was being unethical.
reviews.ownerResponse: I place significant emphasis on providing sound and competent legal advice and do my best to secure quick and favorable resolutions. Unfortunately, some matters are unable to be resolved quickly for certain reasons, which makes trial inevitable. Divorce is an emotional and financially turbulent time and I do my best to not add to the stress by providing candid legal advice and extending latitude from time to time, but given the significant investment of time, and expense, I ask for the same consideration for my work. If that consideration is not returned, then I am, unfortunately,  forced to withdraw.

reviews.text: Jacob and his team helped make what I thought was going to be a stressful process smooth snd easy.  I always felt like I was informed of where we were in the process and appreciate how quickly they were able to help move this process along.

Great attorney firm. Provided information pertaining to the law that wa stelevant for my case and options on how to proceed. I felt like the firm really cared about my needs and understanding my situation. Would definitely recommend for anyone needing help w/ family law services.

Jacob Arijanto is an honest, efficient, caring, skilled family attorney.   He and all who works with him showed compassion and understanding in a very difficult situation. There are no words for my appreciation and good luck in working with Jacob and his team.  Jacob Arijanto is the only family attorney I recommend!

A good friend of mine referred me to Jacob Arijanto as they were being represented by him & I am eternally grateful for choosing him to represent me. He took a lot of the burden that comes with ending a marriage and explained everything in a manner that made sense. His paralegal Nicole was also very diligent in assisting with the case. Now that I have resolution that I am satisfied with I can honestly say I would recommend Jacob as a lawyer to any family or friend that might find themselves needing help with family law.

Jacob handled my son’s custody case so well. He has a very calming presence but also makes sure his clients know what the next steps are and really lays out the path very well. We cannot thank him enough for helping our son and our beautiful granddaughter out and helping them see and reach for their bright future.

Straight forward and realistic, while being extremely helpful and informative.  Was able to get exactly what we wanted done, and It was painless.   Couldn't recommend higher and will continue to use personally if ever needed.  Great experience.
Jacob helped me though one of the most difficult things I've ever had to go through. He managed the massive amount of evidence as well as the complex and unique challenges my case brought.

Jacob was 100% efficient, flex able, understanding, and I will definingly use his again if I have any other Family Law matters. I've never felt more at ease with my High Conflict family law issues then when I was working with Jacob. He reassured me that I was in good care and that he will do everything in his power to get what was best for my situation.
Jacob was very professional and always responded in a very timely manner.  He was great to work with and explained everything along the way which was greatly appreciated.
Jacob was amazing to work with. He is extremely good at his job. He is also a very kind and you could tell he cared about what he was doing. Would highly recommend him to anyone.
Jacob is a highly capable and thorough attorney. He is knowledgeable about the law and advocates for his clients. Whenever someone needs a family lawyer I send them to Jacob without hesitation.

Jacob was awesome! He took the time to answer all my questions. He was quick to respond and always communicated when he would be unavailable. Jacob made my divorce easy and uncomplicated. I really appreciate all his hard work. -Cassidy

Jacob is wonderful to work with! He is professional and efficient while also maintaining genuine care and concern for his clients. He was always two steps ahead and was great at keeping us informed of the process so we were never left wondering where we were at. I would highly recommend him to anyone!
Jacob was great to work with. He was on top of everything and kept my on the loop. I couldn’t have had a better attorney!

Jacob was able to help me finalize my divorce after 2 years and 4 months from a 6 month long marriage. My first attorney told me I couldn't get an annulment when it was possible and never subpoenaed important documents when he said he did. If I had been with Jacob from the start this process would've been less painful. Jacob is honest and direct, he is strategic and effective. Mine was an extremely difficult case but Jacob was able to close it in less than a year of hiring him.
It was great working with Jacob. He is incredibly smart and efficient at his work. His ethics are above and beyond and I had no doubt he always had the best in mind for me.

He is an out right liar. I paid Jacob so he could call my ex’s family and interrogate me regarding their slander.  Stay away!!

Jacob contacted me after this review in retaliation. Pictures will be provided.

Jacob was a very professional and caring attorney as he assisted me though a rough divorce. He was always there to keep me grounded and informed. He would reply timely and kept information in layman terms or would explain to my understanding. I highly recommend his services to anyone going through divorce,  he has his ____(stuff) together.

Jake did an excellent job as my lawyer during my divorce. He communicated very well and always gave me the pros and cons of decisions I needed to make. When I need late night or last second advice Jake would call me back at a moments notice. He's a great lawyer and I'll be recommending him to anyone that needs family law representation.

Jacob(and his paralegal, Kaylee), have been absolutely wonderful in helping me with my divorce and protective order against my ex husband. Efficient, professional, took the time to listen to my concerns and made sure my daughter and I were well taken care of. Can’t thank them enough.

Jacob is extremely helpful and very good at what he does. He helped me manage the cost of litigation and was able to help me negotiate a settlement through mediation. He was professional and responsive through email, text, and phone calls. He stayed on top of my case and did a lot of research that ended up helping my case, saving me thousands of dollars. Thank you!
I’m happy to say I was more than pleased with how amazing, attentive and assertive Mr. Arijanto was! A wonderful attorney to have represent you! I am very grateful!
Jacob is a great attorney! He explained all steps and options very clearly, the process was smooth and easy. Very knowledgeable and responds quickly. Would highly recommend!

Jacob was an amazing attorney. He explained every step of the process with me so I went into everything with a complete understanding of the steps we took but also what was needed from me. He made a usually painful and stressful process much easier to deal with. I would highly recommend him!

Thank you so much Jacob Arijanto, Jacob Arijanto is an awesome and amazing Anthony.  Believe me or not Jacob Arijanto is a wonderful person, honestly, trusted and he follows you step-by-step for your case. You can trust him and honestly. I trusted him to safe my life out of jail by following my case step-by-step and he did a wonderful job.
☆Jacob Arijanto again I'm telling you I trusted you and I'm trusting you in this case. We're in the month of Ramadan that we fast by fearing to Allah, that means I'm talking the truth.

Thanks
Aweis Osman
Jacob was a pleasure to work with. He helped me understand the process and made a difficult situation go smoothly. He did a Great Job & I would highly recommend him.

Jacob is a very strong attorney from an advocacy standpoint.  At every point in my divorce process, he has been prepared and comes with strategy and purpose to all meetings.  I have been both thoroughly impressed and very pleased with his capabilities and professionalism on all ends of this equation!
I highly recommend if you ever need help that involves an attorney. That you hire Jacob Arijanto at Carr Woodall!!

I had the pleasure of working with both Jacob and Spencer. Jacob did a awesome job with my PO case. I was nervous and knowing that he was going to handle it took a load off my shoulders. He case that he built was strong. I am impressed. Spencer made me feel supported in whatever decision I made. I never felt pressured and that meant a lot. I would definitely recommend either one of these attorney’s.

Jacob and his group were very responsive and also considerate of time on my case. I always thought the time versus value was important and well used. During mediation he was great in helping come to an agreement and also coming within prediscussed thoughts on possible outcomes.  Thanks again Jacob!

Jacob did such an amazing job with my case. Without disclosing too many details about the personal aspects of my case; I like many other men had a wife that wanted to get divorced when I did not. I spent a large part of the year trying to make sure that my family stayed together because of how important it was to me.

After almost a year of cruel and vindictive behavior despite all of my best attempts to save my marriage, I finally broke down when my child was withheld from me unjustly. Jacob reached out to me the same day that I reached out to his firm and he could tell I was in a panic and was emotionally devastated. Jacob walked me through the process, and was extremely blunt (in a majorly positive way that I needed) with what we could do to achieve the best possible outcome. Jacob always made himself available to me when I was under duress, even during odd hours, and when I felt serious doubt he was always there to pick me back up.

I can honestly say that I'm tearful when writing this review because of what Jacob was able to do for me, and my son. I cannot recommend Jacob more highly, and I will never forget what he has done.

It was a truly amazing experience getting to work with Jacob. When I had first started looking for counsel I was in a really hard situation, I had no clue what to expect and what options will be available. After months of what seemed like a never ending battle I was able to get an extremely good outcome for what felt like an impossible situation. Jacob was able to find the best out of every turn my case had taken, while dealing with an extremely emotional situation for me and my family. I will always recommend him for any of my friends who need help and HIGHLY suggest to any one reading this to talk with Jacob on your case! Thanks for all you have done for me, I will always appreciate it.

Jacob has been my lawyer for almost two years. With his help, we were granted full custody of my minor children, which is not very common in this state given that I’m a father. My case has been long and arduous with many motions being filed, hearings to attend, and constant changes. Through it all Jacob has worked tirelessly and well into the night on multiple occasions to ensure my stuff gets done. He has provided sound advice and counsel throughout, and has always had my family’s best interest at heart when helping me make decisions through the process. He is always quick to pick up the phone or to respond to an email. He is honest and professional, and I am grateful he is my lawyer. I would highly recommend anyone to him for divorce, custody dispute, and family law cases.

I was very impressed with the work Jacob did on my divorce case. I felt very comfortable in our communications and asked questions as needed. He really listened to my concerns and addressed them with care. He was very responsive to my calls and emails. I felt like he was a honest, trustworthy, kind, knowledgeable, listened, and understood my situation. It was good to have an ally in my corner. I expressed my concerns about payment as I was having a third party assist me financially and I needed to spend their money wisely. Jacob was very considerate of my request. I always felt involved with our strategy and really listened too. I would highly recommend using Jacob Arijanto for your legal counsel.

I could have spent tens of thousands of dollars on this case to end up with the same result after going to court. I'm so grateful to have had an honest and intelligent lawyer to properly help me through one of the hardest times if my life. Thank you so much Jacob.

Jacob was a voice of reason and gave sound advice as he helped me through a very difficult situation. He was able to go to bat for me and negotiate a settlement. He is knowledgeable and friendly and I would definitely recommend him!

I reached out with a legal question and received a quick, professional response. They were honest that a colleague would be a better fit and kindly provided a referral. Really appreciate the professionalism and help.

Dean Smith was an incredible asset to my million plus dollar deal that was a sale by owner deal. He walked me through the entire deal and watched for my best intrest and maximized the transaction to the fullest. Dean is a true professional in his field. I cannot thank him enough.

I became executor of my late uncle’s estate in Arizona in June of 2025. In sorting through his affairs, I located paperwork from a law firm in Utah concerning shares from my late aunt’s estate. My uncle had initiated the process of transferring her shares, but had not completed it before his own passing. It seemed logical to work with the same attorney my uncle had already been working with.
After two months of chasing this person with no response, I found Dean Smith on Yelp. I emailed him, and got a quick response. He immediately went to work and got things moving. He has been extremely responsive, communicative, mindful of our timeline, and has done a wonderful job of assisting us through the entire process.
I’m so grateful to have found him, and would highly recommend working with him.
Hired Dean for some real estate legal work and he was great! Timely responses and clear explanations. Wouldn’t hesitate to work with him again on other matters.

It was a real pleasure working with Dean Smith. We conducted a private party sell. No realtors were involved. Dean handled EVERYTHING for us and the Title Agency for the sale and closing of our mom's home. He is a true professional and a pleasure to work with! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

I was referred to Dean Smith by our real estate agent.  I could not have been more pleased!  He is responsive, knowledgeable, gives conservative cautious advice and represented our interests expertly in a recent new home purchase in Park City.  In addition, his service was very prompt when we needed him with a deadline approaching.
The work was very detailed and precise, prepared to do exactly what we wanted!

I rarely have the need to engage a Real Estate Attorney so when I first reached out to Dean it was a bit like the famous line from Forrest Gump-"Life is like a box of chocolates; you never know what you are going to get."
Fortunately for me I hit the jackpot. Dean was extremely helpful, willing, knowledgeable and impeccable. His attention to detail and patience with me was just what I needed to get the result I needed.
Dean has my full confidence. He is ethical, professional and just an all round good guy. I highly recommend him to anyone requiring the services of a Real Estate Attorney.

Dean's service is amazing. He covers all of the legal requirements of a real estate transaction, simply and smoothly, saving a tremendous amount of money versus a traditional real estate agencies fees.

As new landlords, Dean expertly guided us step-by-step through the process of creating a customized lease for our rental property. He responded promptly to all our questions and requests, was extremely thorough, and maintained excellent communication throughout the entire process.

Worked with Dean to figure out a purchase and get the deal done. Wouldn't hesitate to work with him again. I definitely recommend getting in touch with him if you're looking for a real estate attorney.
Dean was great to work with. He was fast, efficient, and he answered all our questions without any fluff. We felt like he only billed us for actual work done, and he was worth every penny.

Mr. Dean Smith was amazing to work with and very knowledgeable. He helped make the process of FSBO smooth and easy. He was prompt with his responses to our questions and made sure all our documents were legal and correct with the sale of our home. We highly recommend him and thank him for his assistance.

We were selling a home for the first time. It was much more complicated and confusing than we anticipated.
Dean solved all that.
He guided us through offers and paperwork and escrow and disclosure and made things much less scary.
For way less than a realtor's commission.
Dean was fast to respond and got my commercial lease sorted fast. Will use again on futures deals
Used dean to close a house in 10 days - quick and simple

Dean was very helpful with the entire process of selling the home. He was prompt in his replies and took care of everything we needed. As the executor I was lost on what I needed to do on behalf of the estate and he made my part feel effortless.  Thank you!

I employed Dean Smith for the 'Sale by Owner' of our rental home. His rates were extremely reasonable and he was quick to review each document and give advice. I would definitely use him again for future sales or purchases of real estate.

Dean was great to work with! He contacted me quickly, was easy to contact whenever I needed to, helped me through the process, was upfront about pricing, and was very reasonable with the hours I was billed for. I would recommend him to anyone in need of a professional attorney.
Dean helped me with buying a property. He was great, and helped ensure the process went smoothly without legal issues on my side. I recommend working with him.

I was referred to Dean Smith by a local real estate broker here in Sanpete County. I had no clue who he was or if he would be a good fit for me. I reached out to Dean and guess what? He actually return my call and was very professional! I explained my situation and Dean listened and stated he could help me to sell my commercial property. Dean was extremely knowledgeable and represented me very well! He was very thorough and brought up several key items that I had not thought of or missed in my negotiations. He even assisted the Title Company on making sure we had an accurate closing. In the end he guided me through the a very important transaction of selling my real estate  business property, including a 23 room motel and a 80 seat full service restaurant. It was one of the cleanest, most smooth transactions that I have ever experienced! But you want to know the best part? Because of his expertise, knowledge, professionalism and demeanor we became friends! That's what I call a win-win outcome! I HIGHLY recommend Dean Smith for any of your real estate attorney/legal needs, you will not be disappointed!

Dean is a great attorney, he was knowledgeable regarding our home purchase. He was timely with his responses to our inquiries, even when he was on vacation. We would use his services again if we ever plan on buying or selling our home again!

I am a real estate broker. Dean represented my client get a favorable lease. Dean worked diligently not only with our client but also communicated closely with a national landlord's legal department to get the deal done. I highly recommend Dean and his service when a lease needs to be reviewed and finely tuned. I will definitely use his service in the future.
Dean has been a wonderful attorney to work with. He responds quickly, finds solutions, and communicates clearly. I really appreciate his skill level, integrity, and kindness!

This was my first For Sale by Owner home sale.  Dean was amazing!  He walked me through each step, and was very patient with my questions.  He thoroughly vetted all documents and had great guidance on what directions to take.  I highly recommend him when considering a FSBO process, fantastic service!!

Dean helped me navigate through a very complex 1031 exchange that involved an inherited property and family interests. Thank you for your patience and expertise. I feel like every detail was just as important to Dean as it was to me.

It was such a pleasure working with Dean! He assisted us in selling our home and was incredibly responsive, always answering all my questions. He made several revisions to the real estate purchase contract as needed. I’ll definitely work with him again in the future.

I have nothing but great things to say about Dean. I was looking for an attorney to help me with the sale of my home while I'm stationed overseas and he made the entire process as smooth as I could have hoped for. Between the time zone differences and the complexity of my situation, he was extremely patient and prompt from beginning to end. I highly recommend him.

Sold my very first property with the help of Dean, his services were super simple and fast. It was a condo in downtown Salt Lake City. I had a lot of questions throughout the process, he was patient and helpful through it all. Definitely recommend him!

We sold our property directly by owner recently and Dean made the entire process smooth, reassuring, and trusting that it was being done the right way. Dean repeatedly demonstrated professionalism in our interactions and was clearly looking out for our best interests, while also holding steady with a fixed upfront price for his services. If we were to sell another property, we would not hesitate to look to Dean to support us in that process!

We are out of state lenders on Utah property. Dean Smith was exactly who we needed. He was prompt, professional and reasonably priced. We have used several real estate attorneys in the past on transactions, and he is definitely one of the best!

Our experience with Dean has been first rate! Dean provided the guidance and fair counsel that helped us navigate the sale of our home. His exceptional organization, timeliness, and consistent follow up help keep the entire process on track. We highly recommend Dean to anyone looking to sell their home on the own. This reviewer is not, and has never been, a client. She was not present during any meetings with my actual clients. Her comments are therefore not based on personal knowledge of the legal representation provided. She is reviewing the same event as Rebecca Akester.

In estate planning, especially when death or incapacity occurs, pre-existing family tensions can surface. That is precisely why carefully structured planning is so important — to protect the clients’ wishes and shield the estate from disruption. Our documents are created with those protections in mind.

I am bound by strict confidentiality rules and cannot discuss matters with non-clients, no matter how frustrated they may be. When contacted here, I was compelled to decline comment or even to suggest a course of action.

While I cannot comment on the specifics of any individual situation, I can say that the quality of our work is the result of more than thirty years of focused practice in estate planning. Our approach has been refined over decades and has been recognized by both peers and professionals for its clarity, strength, and ability to withstand precisely this kind of emotional and legal turbulence that can follow a family crisis.

It’s always painful when families experience conflict during times of grief or stress. My sincere hope is that all involved find peace, and that the planning done provides the stability and guidance it was intended to deliver.

reviews.text:
My divorce was finalized February of 2024 so I've had time to reflect on the very poor counsel I received from my Attorney, Brittany. At the time, I didn't receive proper counsel to fully understand the repercussions that have come from her only being concerned about the amount of money she was making. It was clear my case was the lowest priority on her schedule as she would reach out to me 5 minutes before their office closed and rush through her conversation with me. I paid over $12,000 (talk about taking advantage of people in their time of need) for her to respond to a few emails and call me on occasion. It's really criminal how much they charge, especially when going through a divorce. Our mediation was terrible and she did not provide proper counsel. I agreed to things that I didn't fully understand until later because she didn't take the time to explain what that meant to me or care about my case. Her only advice was, "let's take her to court!" Which really just means, "let's drag this out and spend even more money." I mean, she let my ex-wife take half equity in my 4-year old car resulting in me having to pay her thousands for my car! Who takes equity in a car? But I didn't realize how crazy that was until afterwards. There are multiple other things she did not help/counsel on that I am stuck with. She absolutely did not do her due diligence with me.

She really was bad, had a poor attitude and it was so clear that she really didn't care about my case. Now, even after spending thousands of dollars, I am stuck with repercussions that I shouldn't have been stuck with but because of her "legal counsel", I can't doing anything about it. Very disappointed. Lawyers really are terrible, the type of profession that really likes to take advantage of people in their time of need. It's just so disappointing/frustrating to think about. I can't speak for other attorney's there, but I would absolutely ask for another attorney if you end up getting Brittany. And the irony of coming to a Father's-rights law office and being stuck with a female attorney who knows nothing about being a father.

And just so you know, she/they charged about $400/hour and at best, even if things go great and there isn't a lot of issues, you'll spend well over $10,000 to get a divorce. Tell me how that's right? Tell me how that's not taking advantage of people in their time of need?

It really was a horrible situation while already being in a terrible situation with the divorce. Honestly, I would do everything you can to avoid using a lawyer if you can.
reviews.ownerResponse: Cory. We're sorry you feel this way and that it took you so long to come to this conclusion after the close of your case. There's a lot to unpack here, and some misrepresentations made. All we will say is that you have greatly exaggerated the amount you paid us as well as our hourly rate. We wish you would have reached out to us directly to explore what we might be able to do to help. If you feel so inclined, please do so and we will do our best to help in any way possible.

I don’t usually write reviews, but I felt compelled to share my experience with Nathan Evershed because of the impact he’s had on my life.

When I first came to Nathan, I was in a very difficult place—facing a serious felony case, feeling lost, and losing faith in a system I didn’t trust. My previous attorney had mishandled my case and left me feeling unseen, unheard, and unprotected. From the moment I met Nathan, that changed.

Nathan not only listened to me, but he truly saw me. He took the time to understand my story, my circumstances, and what was at stake. His professionalism, compassion, and commitment gave me a renewed sense of hope. He fought hard for me—not just in the courtroom, but as a person fighting to rebuild his life after hardship.

Because of Nathan’s dedication and skill, my case was reduced from a felony to a misdemeanor, giving me the opportunity to move forward and begin restoring my life and peace of mind. I can honestly say that Nathan is not just a phenomenal defense attorney—he is a fighter for justice, for redemption, and for good people who are trying to change their lives.

For anyone who feels misrepresented, misunderstood, or hopeless in the legal system, I want to say this: you can trust Nathan Evershed. He will fight for you, represent you with integrity, and give you the best possible chance in a system that doesn’t always play fair.

I’m deeply grateful for his representation and the way he helped me find strength and peace through one of the most challenging chapters of my life.
reviews.ownerResponse: John - it was a sincere pleasure to represent you and get you through this trial. We truly appreciate your kind review and are so glad you have your life back.

reviews.text:
I cannot thank Nathan and Kim enough or say enough good things about working with them. I was initially charged with a felony and a misdemeanor, and from the very beginning they handled my case with compassion, professionalism, and deep knowledge of the law and court process. They took the time to explain everything clearly and answered every question I had, which eased my stress during an incredibly difficult time.

Most importantly, the outcome was better than I ever could have hoped for: the felony was dropped and my sentence included no jail time—the best possible result for what I was facing. That was life-changing relief for me and my family. I truly felt they cared about me as a person, not just a case number, and they fought hard to protect my future. My case was delicate, and I maintained my innocence from the start; they never wavered, never made me feel disbelieved, and always stayed in my corner. Being accused of something you didn’t do while still needing to be realistic about the best legal path is hard—Nathan and Kim explained those choices effortlessly, which I appreciated most.

I highly recommend Kim and Nathan to anyone needing strong, honest, and skilled defense attorneys. They gave me back peace of mind and a chance to move forward with my life.

I also want to give a special thank-you to Cindy, their paralegal. She was absolutely outstanding—always attentive, always took my calls seriously (no matter how many), and never once made me feel like a burden. Her patience, attentiveness, and kindness made a huge difference during one of the most stressful times of my life.

This entire team went above and beyond for me, and I am deeply grateful for their dedication and care. I highly recommend them to anyone who needs strong, skilled, and compassionate representation.

On or about 11/21/2026 Google three-star review read…
“Filing for bankruptcy is never easy. There are a lot of steps we never thought about. I guess we just thought that Beutler would "hold our hands" through all the steps. I, at least, thought that. We pay the fees every month, but we are apparently responsible for; getting the title of our vehicle after the bankruptcy was complete, (I'm currently sitting on hold with the credit union.) This law firm will not "affirm" to our mortgage company we want to keep our home. (We were told Beutler won't file that in court in our state of Utah.) So we can't make payments online for our home. The worst part is my disabled veteran needs adaptions to our home, but we'll never get that "$0 balance owed statement" we need to start making construction happen for the Veterans Administration. Ask questions from your attorney before you sign any paperwork and do not settle for "We'll figure that out later." Know what you need before you agree to services. Very disappointed. Very frustrated.”
New one-star review 02/21/2026. After speaking with my bank, we were able to get the title to the vehicle. I was able to prove we paid all the “corporate advance fees” to our mortgage company. The mortgage statements proved we paid all their fees, so our building can start before my husband is stuck in a wheelchair. But now new “corporate advance fees” stating we are STILL in bankruptcy and they need a discharge. My husband paid all the attorney fees, but this law firm still won’t help us end this nightmare. The worst part is my disabled veteran husband, and I have medical bills piling up from the painful stress of being charged thousands of dollars in legal fees through our mortgage company. We can't get new windows for our 21-year-old home because the bankruptcy ruined my credit. My dog needed emergency surgery and again, denied credit because of the bankruptcy that I NEVER FILED, BUT BECAUSE I AM COSIGNER ON THE HOME, I’M LABLED AS IN BANKRUPTCY. Again, I say, ask questions from your attorney before you sign any paperwork and do not settle for "We'll figure that out later." Know what you need before you agree to services. It's time to look elsewhere for solutions. I can't keep paying fees on a bankruptcy that was supposed to be discharged months ago.
